context: Per Elyos delivered means not merged: success is outcomes delivered to real beneficiaries. Without a committed downstream consumer, the engine has no last-mile delivery. Internal Elyos projects (a11y-alttext-commons, public-domain-translations) are immediate committed adopters; an external steward is the goal. Depends on partner-001. See PLAN.md (Problem and beneficiaries, M1 exit criterion g).
acceptanceCriteria: At least one candidate downstream consumer or external steward is identified and contacted.
Internal Elyos consumer projects (a11y-alttext-commons, public-domain-translations, or similar) are formally confirmed as committed immediate adopters.
The outreach and commitment document is committed as a permanent record.
The document records what a committed steward would need to adopt and sustain the feed.
output: A committed partner-engagement document recording candidate stewards contacted and internal consumer commitments secured.
title: Identify and engage at least one candidate downstream consumer/steward
objective: Identify and initiate engagement with at least one candidate downstream consumer or external steward; confirm internal Elyos consumers as committed adopters of the feed; document engagement status honestly.
